narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion.. and you are still doing
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, portraying it as hysterical, exaggerated, and fundamentally dishonest in its portrayal of Russia as a threat.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly and no more of month after month of promises from Trump or threats from the east….POOF..it’s all over …thanks mostly to un-elected bureaucrats in all “western countries” they are proving the worst of the worst of humanity
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text predicts and seemingly advocates for a catastrophic nuclear war as a consequence of Western political actions, framing it as an inevitable negative outcome brought about by Western 'un-elected bureaucrats.'

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly evokes fear and anxiety about the ultimate consequence of the conflict: total nuclear annihilation. It presents this as a plausible or even desired outcome to end the current situation.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly questions the reliability and motives of Western media, accusing it of deceptive framing ('as if Russia is losing') that has harmful real-world consequences, thereby undermining trust in these media sources.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Russia is Winning, Nuclear Threat is a Sign of Desperation & Very Serious
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The title and premise of the discussion are built on speculating about the outcome of the war ('Russia is Winning') and the potential consequences ('Nuclear Threat').

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA or at later stages CHINA way out of proportion..
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly criticizes Western (specifically American) foreign policy and perception, portraying it as hysterical and unjustifiably antagonistic towards Russia and China, which aligns with the narrative of discrediting Western diplomatic stances and actions.
